---
title: "*Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase Diagrams* Reference Page"
author: "DOFPro group"
format: html
html-math-method: mathjax
---
::: {.callout-important title="Still Under Construction!"}
This web page is just a bare outline. The complete details have not been filled in yet.
:::
# Intro to *Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase DiagramsTitle*

Main title explanation

## Using DWSIM to Create Binary Phase Diagrams

Video 1 explanation

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/5NUchIg8q7E?si=VRyVOkM4ANTQn37s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Examples and Definitions

## Examples Links

## Definitions

DWSIM
: An open-source [process flow simulation software](https://dwsim.org/) package

# Other Links and Videos

## Other Links

## Previous and Following Videos

### The video previous to the previous video (i.e., two videos back)

**The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong? Part 2**<br/>*Distillation Examples: Binary Phase Diagram, Raoult's law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/wc6gv7lNtI0), [Info Page](../../balances/material/EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/material/86-EquilibriumSeparationStages2Visuals.qmd)

### The previous video (i.e., one video back)

**The Shocking Truth About Equilibrium Stages—Are You Doing It Wrong? Part 3**<br/>*Liquid-Liquid Extraction Example*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/jcChVoELvFo), [Info Page](../../balances/material/EqullibriumStagesVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/material/86.5-EquilibriumSeparationStages3Visuals.qmd)

### The next video (i.e., one video forward)

**Just Try to Break This Law! I Dare You!**<br/>*Intro to 1st Law*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/ZHWT9Jw7fzY), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/Intro1stLawVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/89-Intro1stLawVisuals.qmd)

### The next after next video (i.e. two videos forward)

**Add Friction and Work to Bernoulli? Here’s What Really Happens!**<br/>*The Mechanical Energy Balance and the Moody Chart*<br/>[Video](https://youtu.be/Da48oZb9oNw), [Info Page](../../balances/energy/MechanicalEnergyBalanceVideoInfoWebPage.qmd), [Visuals](../../balances/energy/90-MechEngBalVisuals.qmd)
